title: Oil Filter Torque Specification
summary: Tighten filter element nut to 10 ft-lb and housing bolts to 60-130 ft-lb.
evidence_quote: 将螺母紧固于底板上达到 10磅-英尺(13.3N.m) 的扭力...拧紧至 60磅-英尺(79.8N.m), 直至 130磅-英尺(172.9N.m) 扭力.

title: Oil Temperature Control Range (Thermosiphon)
summary: Oil temperature typically 15-35°F above condensing temperature; condensing 65-105°F, oil 80-140°F.
evidence_quote: 油温一般降在冷凝温度以上约 15°F-35° F. 冷凝温度: 65 °F - 105° F 油温度:  80 °F - 140°F

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Adjustment Method
summary: Turn thrust bearing clockwise until noticeable resistance (zero end clearance), then back off specified distance.
evidence_quote: 转动转轮的时候顺时针转动止推轴承组件直到出现明显的阻力。这个是零末端间隙。...逆时针转动止推轴承，下面列出的距离是在轴承座外面测量的。

title: Oil Pump Thrust Bearing Adjustment Procedure
summary: Loosen two screws on front of thrust bearing assembly; if shaft not free, turn thrust bearing counterclockwise until free.

structured_payload.value: loosen screws, turn counterclockwise if needed

evidence_quote: 松开止推轴承装置前端的两颗螺钉。如果轴旋转不顺畅的话，逆时针转动止推轴承直到轴能够自由旋转。

title: Oil Pump End Clearance Measurement
summary: Mark relative position of bearing housing to casing, then back off thrust bearing by specified distance measured on outside of bearing housing.

evidence_quote: 记下轴承座与壳体的相对位置。逆时针转动止推轴承，下面列出的距离是在轴承座外面测量的。

title: Graphite Bushing Installation Caution
summary: Graphite bushing is brittle; install straight with steady pressure, do not stop until fully seated.
evidence_quote: 在安装石墨衬套的时候必须非常小心以防破裂。石墨是一种脆性材料，容易破裂。...在衬套到正确位置之前要一直保持按压。

title: Oil Pump Troubleshooting Safety
summary: Before any pump adjustment or opening liquid cavity, ensure pressure is relieved, moving parts locked out, and pump temperature is safe.

structured_payload.value: relieve pressure, lock out, cool down

evidence_quote:
在做任何泵的调节或以任何形式打开泵的液体腔的时候，确认以下几点：
1.腔体内的压力已经通过吸排气口或其他的接口排出壳体外。
2.运动部件 (电动机，涡轮，发动机等) 已经被“ 锁定” 或不可运行
3.泵体温度已经冷却到不会对人体造成灼伤的温度。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Oil Pump Pressure Gauge High Reading Causes
summary: High discharge pressure gauge reading indicates: high viscosity, long/small discharge line, partially closed valve, clogged filter, high specific gravity, buildup, cold liquid, chemical reaction, or high relief valve setting.
evidence_quote:
1.大的读数表明：
a. 粘性系数太高，太小或者太长的排气管线。
b. 闸阀部分关闭。
c. 过滤器堵塞。
d. 液体的比重不大。
e. 管道内由于杂物堆积而部分堵塞。
f. 管道内液体温度太低。
g. 管道内液体发生化学反应并产生了结块。
h. 缓解阀设定过高。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Oil Pump Not Pumping Causes
summary: Pump not pumping: air leak, low liquid level, wrong rotation, slow motor, closed valves, clogged filter, relief valve open, pump worn, tight end clearance, incorrect head position.
evidence_quote:
1.泵不工作。
a.空气泄漏进来，箱体内液位太低。
b.旋转方向不正确。
c.电机转速较慢。
d.吸排液阀没有打开。
e.过滤器阻塞。
f.缓解阀开得太小或提升头还开着。
g.泵破损。
h.液体系统的任何变化或操作将会帮助解释问题。
i.拧紧末端间隙。
j.泵的头部位置不正确。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Oil Pump Excessive Noise Causes
summary: Excessive noise: insufficient liquid, cavitation, misalignment, bent shaft/rotor teeth, foreign object in suction.

structured_payload.value: insufficient liquid, cavitation, misalignment, bent parts, foreign object

evidence_quote:
3.泵工作噪音过大。
a.没有足够的液体进入泵内 (比重比较大的液体不能很快进入 )。增加吸液管径或减少长度。
b.泵发生气蚀 (吸液管内液体蒸发 )。增加吸液管径或减少长度。
c.检查校准。
d.可能轴或转轮齿瓣发生弯曲。把它们弄直或者更换。
e.可能在泵的吸入口有一外来物体试图进入泵内。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Oil Pump Not Reaching Rated Capacity Causes
summary: Not reaching rated capacity: insufficient liquid/cavitation, partially clogged filter, air leak, slow speed, relief valve open, pump worn, tight end clearance, incorrect head position.
evidence_quote:
4.泵没有到达额定能力。
a.液体不够或者发生气蚀 --- 增加吸液管径 或减少长度。
b.过滤器部分阻塞—清洗。
c.在吸液管或泵轴有空气进入。
d.转动太慢 – 马达是否在正确的速度，接线是否正确。
e.缓解阀开的太小或者仍旧开着。
f.泵破损。
g.拧紧末端间隙。
h.泵的头部位置不正确。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Vibration Analysis Guidelines
summary: Take vibration readings at same location and load percentage; use initial startup readings as baseline.
evidence_quote: 要确保从同一位置在相同的负荷百分率下读取振动记录 . 使用新机组启动时得到的振动读数作为基准参考
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Oil Quality Analysis Rules
summary: Use only Frick-approved oil and filters; perform regular oil analysis.
evidence_quote: 只可用 Frick冷冻机油或由 Frick公司认可的高质量冷冻机油. 只能使用 Frick公司生产的油过滤器或者经过  Frick公司认可可以使用的油过滤器。有规律,定期的油分析对于油和系统整体的维护是有帮助的.
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Pressure Sensor Test Procedure (PE-4)
summary: Isolate PE-4, vent to atmosphere, measure voltage between white and black on P4; should be 1.48-1.72 VDC at standard atmospheric pressure.
evidence_quote: 从机组中隔开入口传感器 PE-4并使之减压. ...用数字伏特计测定单板机上连接器 P4上的 PE-4电压(白色和黑色端子间) ...在标准大气压下,(14.7 磅/英寸2绝对压力或 0磅/英寸2表压力),电压读数应为 1.48-1.72VDC 直流电.
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Pressure Sensor Replacement Procedure
summary: Shut off control power, close isolation valve, disconnect wires, unscrew sensor, install new sensor, reconnect, open valve, restore power.

structured_payload.value: shut power, close valve, replace, restore

evidence_quote: 切断控制电源 ...关闭传感 器隔离阀. ...松开要更换的传感器上的端子螺栓, 拆开传感器导线. ...用扳手拧松在传感器底板处的金属六角螺钉, 拆下传感器. ...安装新传感器 . ...重新连接传感器. ...重新打开传感器隔离阀. ...接通控制电源 .
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Slide Valve Potentiometer Replacement and Adjustment
summary: Replace potentiometer, then coarse adjust resistance to 1000±150 ohms with slide valve fully unloaded; fine adjust POT#4 for 0% and POT#3 for 100%.
evidence_quote: 粗调必须在滑阀完全卸载且切断控制电源下进行 . ...电阻值应为 1000±150 欧 姆. ...细调必须在滑块完全卸载且压缩机正在运行时进行, 此时运行显示应指示滑阀开度位置为 0%. 若显示大于 0%,调节单板机上的电位计 POT#4,直到显示 0%. ...当滑阀加到全负荷, 显示应为 100%. 若低于 100%,调节单板机上的电位计 POT#3直到指示为 100%.
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Jordan Temperature Regulator Installation
summary: Install on horizontal line with arrow in flow direction; can be mounted at any angle, even inverted. Bulb vertical (arrow down) needs no special care; bulb horizontal must have 'TOP' correctly oriented; tilted bulb not allowed.

structured_payload.value: horizontal, arrow flow direction, bulb orientation per instructions

evidence_quote: 乔丹温度调节阀必须安装在水平管线上，箭头指向流体流动的方向。然而阀还可以安装在垂墔直于水平管的任何角度的地方，如果需要的话还可以倒装。感温包，垂墔直安装。感温包垂墔直安装 (箭头向下) 的话，不需要什么注意点。当感温包被倒着垂墔直安装的话，需要添加一特别的毛细管，这是因为感温包的顶部高于毛细管的末端。感温包，水平安装。当把感温包水平安装的时候，应使印在毛细管末端的”TOP”字样正确显示 注意：  感温包的倾斜安装是不允许的 。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Jordan Temperature Regulator Action Check
summary: Valve should be set as reverse-acting; if direct-acting (orifice left, slot top), rotate disc and seat 180° to change.
evidence_quote: 阀应该被设置成一个反作用力阀，然而有时候会被设置成直接作用力阀。...如果小孔在阀片的左侧且狭缝在阀盘上部的话，这是直接作用阀 (见图 34)。改成反作用阀只需要把阀片和阀盘旋转 180度。这样小孔就在阀片右侧，狭缝就在阀盘的底部 (见图 35)。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Electronic Equipment Installation Guidelines
summary: Use larger wire gauge than required to minimize voltage drop; provide clean isolated power source via control transformer; use copper ground wire same size as power wire or one size smaller; do not mix different voltages in same conduit; do not use control panel as junction box; avoid drilling into panel; prevent water ingress; do not add relays/starters without consulting manufacturer; do not run refrigerant lines through panel; follow manufacturer's instructions.
evidence_quote: 要把供电线路的规定定的比电流图所要求的规格大一些 . ...使用一个控制变压器使电子控制器表盘与工厂里产生电磁干扰的其它设备隔离...接地线尺寸要与电源线相同或尺寸小一些 . ...不要把不同电压的导线混合在一起. ...任何与表盘功能无关的导线不要通过电子控制表盘 . ...不要在控制表盘上钻孔来安装导管接头. ...当导管途径电子控制器表盘的顶部 时, 必须考虑水的冷凝问题...在没有和生产厂家联系之前 . 不要在电子控制表盘内添加继电器, 启动器 ,计时器和变压器等. ...不要在电子控制表盘内通过制冷剂管线. ...不要多接头式或并联连接电源或接地线到电子控制盘上 .
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Pre-start Checklist After Checks
summary: Close main breaker, close starter breaker to activate microprocessor, manually start oil pump and check rotation, manually start compressor motor and check rotation, ensure oil heaters on to bring oil to start temperature.

structured_payload.value: close breakers, check rotation, heat oil

evidence_quote:
上面项目检查并核对以后：
------------关闭主电源和电动机启动器之间的主断路器。
------------关闭启动器断路器，激活微处理器。
------------手动启动油泵，检查油泵的转向。
------------手动启动压缩机电动机并检查电动机的转向。
------------使微处理器打开，确保油加热器的运行，使油温达到启动温度。
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk
